setlist.info: U2's 40th and final show at Sphere. Snippets during “Beautiful Day”: Zucchero and Pavarotti’s “Miserere" (with lyrics by Bono), U2's "Gloria" & The Beatles' "Blackbird". The crowd was recorded singing the "Don't Dream It's Over" chorus.
